verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ

verses.text: for their uniting for the caravan of the winter and the summer:
Let them serve the Lord of this House,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍۢ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
verses.text: who has fed them on account of (their) hunger, and secured them on account of (their) fear.
